name: Virginia Dietitian Title Protection
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
Virginia Board of Health Professions - Dietetics
Department of Health Professions
9960 Mayland Drive, Suite 300
Richmond, Virginia 23233-1463

renewalCycle: No state renewal. CDR registration renews every 5 years with 75 CPE hours.

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Card
requiredDocuments.description: Your active CDR card serves as the primary credential in Virginia.

requiredDocuments.name: ACEND Verification Statement
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of your accredited degree program and supervised practice completion.

mainEntity.name: Does Virginia require a state dietitian license?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Virginia operates under a title-protection model. To use the title 'dietitian' or 'nutritionist', you must meet the qualifications set by the DHP Board of Health Professions, most commonly by holding active CDR registration.

mainEntity.name: What does it cost to practice as a dietitian in Virginia?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no state fee. The CDR national exam costs $200, and the CDR annual maintenance fee is $80 (increasing to $90 in 2027).

mainEntity.name: Is Virginia moving towards formal state licensure?

acceptedAnswer.text: House Bill 576 was introduced in 2026 to enable Virginia to join the Dietitian Licensure Compact, but the bill was left in committee as of February 2026. Virginia does not currently have an active licensure pathway.

mainEntity.name: Does Virginia have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: Virginia is currently a CDR State. There is no separate state endorsement transfer pathway right now; maintain an active CDR credential to practice.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Virginia?

acceptedAnswer.text: This is currently a CDR State, so there is no state transfer timeline. You can usually start once your CDR credential and employer onboarding are complete.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: There is no active state endorsement application to wait on right now. Start dates are typically driven by employer credentialing and onboarding requirements.
